title: Diamond Coated Tool Hole Saw Universal Drill Bit Rotary 80 Grit 6 pack
description:
This 6 piece Diamond Hole Saw Set is great for construction, home improvement, hobbies, arts and crafts, & precision work. Each drill bit has a shank size of 1/4" and is nickel plated with diamond coated tips for superior cutting performance. Each set of 6 comes with a 5/32", 3/16", 1/4", 5/16", 3/8", 1/2" bit. Used for cutting holes in tile, glass, marble, gemstones, slate, and more. The shank size refers to the size of the interior hole rather then the size of the exterior shank. This can be used with a dremel as long as you have a larger, 1/4" collet.
